puzzles.title: Number Grid

clues.fallback: Don't feel Blue, just find what looks the same to you.

puzzles.hintText: Can't see what you're looking for? Return to the start, then Return twice more.

puzzles.title: Library Layers

clues.fallback: Where silence dwells and voices blend, the pattern hides around the bend.

puzzles.hintText: Are you floored? Start where quiet begins, then find its twin; next where chatter starts, then its partner wins.

puzzles.title: Email Chain

clues.fallback: The Handbook’s most recent number – not the page, but the year it came to be.

puzzles.hintText: Are your Study-Skills up to date? Look for the year-of-publication to find out.

puzzles.title: Blank Page

clues.fallback: A torch reveals what’s always open – three digits tell the tale.

puzzles.hintText: Day and night, weeklong light. Catch the numbers hiding in plain sight.
